title: 'Elna`am #0493
definition:
Elnaam = "God is delight" or "God is pleasantness"

 1) the father of two of David's mighty warriors
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elnaam = "God is delight" or "God is pleasantness"

 1) the father of two of David's mighty warriors

    NASB:  God is pleasantness, the father of two of Davids heroes
